query:
SELECT c.externalId, c.name, s.serviceId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue
FROM customers c
JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.externalId IN (
  SELECT externalId FROM customers 
  WHERE name LIKE '%Active Living%' 
    OR name LIKE '%True Metal%' 
    OR name LIKE '%Swara%' 
    OR name LIKE '%Fast Cut%' 
    OR name LIKE '%Bracken Ridge%'
    OR name LIKE '%Mooloolaba%'
    OR name LIKE '%Nicki%'
)
AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00;
